title: IN Scratch-Off Gender Reveal Party Games (8cm x 19cm) - Exciting Boy-Themed Scratch Cards - Perfect for Baby Showers & Memorable Keepsakes - 10ct, Blue (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack

BOY-THEMED SCRATCH CARDS: Our in scratch-off gender reveal party game features exciting and vibrant boy-themed designs, making this the perfect choice for revealing your baby boy's gender during your baby shower or special event.

DURABLE MATERIAL: Made from high-quality, scratch-resistant material, these 8cm x 19cm reveal cards are sturdy and long-lasting, ensuring a frustration-free and mess-free experience for you and your guests. Enjoy a memorable moment without any hassle.

PERFECT FOR BABY SHOWERS: Designed specifically for baby showers, these in scratch-off gender reveal cards provide an engaging activity for guests while creating lasting mementos of the happy occasion.

EASY TO USE: Simply scratch off the designated area on the card to reveal a beautiful baby girl announcement! No additional tools or setup required - just pass out the cards and let the fun and anticipation begin.

PACK OF 10: Each pack contains 10 scratch cards, allowing you to hand them out to your closest friends and family members for a shared reveal experience. Be the talk of the party with our in scratch-off gender reveal party game.
